name: agentic-delivery
description: Research, goal-set, build, independently verify, and deliver engineering work with acceptance-linked evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Research-first delivery with persistent goals and evidence.
interface.longDescription: A portable Codex workflow for calibrated read-only discovery, contract-bound persistent goals, Beads-backed execution, risk-selected verification, real-service browser checks when relevant, independent evidence, and protected delivery adapters.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $agentic-delivery to research this request first with calibrated read-only scouts when useful, freeze the evidence-backed contract, create the persistent goal with the available goal mechanism, and continue until its verified completion target is reached.
